title: Australian-Style Damper
description: A classic Australian bread recipe, perfect for outdoor cooking. This dense, roasted damper is easy to make and ideal for campfires or barbecues.
instructions: 1. Preheat a cast-iron pot or Dutch oven over medium heat.
2. Combine flour and salt (if using) in a large bowl.
3. Gradually add water, mixing until a dough forms.
4. Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth.
5. Shape the dough into a round or oblong shape.
6. Place the dough in the preheated pot, with a lid.
7. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the damper is golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped.
8. Remove from heat, and let cool for 5-10 minutes before serving.
